channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Résistante et taillée pour l’enregistrement en continu, cette microSD 32 Go perd la moitié de son prix
item.description: La microSD SanDisk Max Endurance a clairement été pensée pour vos caméras de surveillance, dashcams et babyphones : elle peut en effet encaisser l'enregistrement en boucle pendant des milliers d'heures. Actuellement, Amazon propose le modèle de 32 Go à 17,99 euros au lieu de 39,99 euros.

item.title: Researchers say we’re talking less than ever
item.description: Researchers at the University of Missouri-Kansas City and the University of Arizona say that between 2005 and 2019, the number of words we speak out loud to another human being fell by nearly 28 percent. And that has likely only gotten worse following the pandemic. The researchers actually counted the number of words we were […]

item.title: Le télescope James-Webb observe une nébuleuse fascinante où brillent les mythiques molécules en forme de ballon de football
item.description: Les buckminsterfullerènes sont des molécules carbonées en forme de ballon de football et dont on avait prévu qu'elles se formaient dans l'espace à la mort de certaines étoiles, devenues récemment des naines blanches. Elles détiennent encore des secrets en rapport avec la formation et l'évolution...

item.title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
item.description: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globally.

item.title: Apps to distract you from the endless cycle of doomscrolling
item.description: It's hard to break the cycle of doomscrolling, but there are plenty of apps that can help you spend more time on content that’s engaging and productive.

item.title: Sharge’s fast Qi2.2 MagSafe battery is down to $70 with a free USB-C cable
item.description: I’ve been testing compact, magnetic Qi2 power banks that can snap onto your phone for an upcoming buying guide. They make recharging much easier than bringing along a huge battery that weighs down your bag. One of my favorites so far is the Sharge Icemag 3, a 10,000mAh model that can wirelessly output 25W to […]

item.title: Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy
item.description: John Ternus, Apple's incoming CEO, is a hardware guy, signaling Apple may be putting devices back at the center of its strategy.

item.title: PIA just dropped its prices to a record low — here's how it compares to the competition
item.description: Highly customizable and now under $2 a month, it’s a killer deal

item.title: What to read this weekend: Monsters in the Archives dives deep into Stephen King's early works
item.description:
Need something new for your reading list? Here are two titles we think are worth checking out. This week, we read Monsters in the Archives: My Year of Fear with Stephen King and the first issue of the Image Comics miniseries, Corpse Knight.
This article originally appeared on Engadget at https://www.engadget.com/entertainment/what-to-read-this-weekend-monsters-in-the-archives-dives-deep-into-stephen-kings-early-works-150000954.html?src=rss...

item.title: D’où viennent les vélos électriques vendus en France ? La production locale résiste, face aux importations chinoises encore très minoritaires
item.description: Malgré une baisse du marché en 2025, la production française de vélos a légèrement augmenté en France, notamment avec une grande part de vélos électriques tandis que l’Europe fournit la grande majorité des importations.

item.title: India’s Snabbit seeks fresh funding at a $400M valuation, sources say
item.description: Snabbit has scaled rapidly, crossing one million jobs in March, amid growing investor interest.

item.title: Tesla is giving away one year free Supercharging with Model 3 Premium and Performance purchases
item.description: Tesla completely ended its free lifetime Supercharging offer way back in 2018, but it has given customers the perk for certain promotions since then. It brought back free Supercharging for Model S and X a couple of times in 2019, for instance. The automaker’s latest offer is for new purchases for a Model 3 Premium or Performance vehicle in North America. On its website, Tesla has announced that it’s including one year of free supercharging with a Model 3 Premium or Performance, though the offer is “subject to change or end at any time.”As Electrek notes, this is a nice freebie to have but most...

item.title: On a vu ces nouvelles sacoches vélo ultra personnalisables, réparables et artisanales : un vrai feu d’artifice de couleurs
item.description: Tout juste lancée en décembre 2025, la jeune marque française Bag’Era débarque avec une promesse forte : des sacoches de vélo sur mesure, personnalisables et artisanales. Nous avons rencontré leurs fondateurs Gaston et Alice Bradel lors du salon Vélo in Paris 2026.

item.title: Sam Altman deeply sorry OpenAI didnt report mass shooting suspect
item.description: OpenAI's CEO Sam Altman published a letter apologizing to Tumbler Ridge for not reporting the alleged shooter after her ChatGPT account was banned.

item.title: ‘No 14-inch laptop is more portable than this’: I reviewed Asus’ answer to the MacBook Air, and loved its super-light design — but it comes with a big catch
item.description: It may prioritize portability, but the Asus Zenbook A14 is no slouch when it comes to performance.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro rumor roundup: 5 of the biggest leaks rated in terms of likelihood — from new colors to Face ID upgrades
item.description: The iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max could have changes to their designs, colors, camera features, and more.

item.title: Test SteelSeries Aerox 3 Wireless Gen 2 : une évolution en douceur
item.description: Quatre ans après l'Aerox 3 Wireless 2022, SteelSeries renouvelle sa gamme avec la Gen 2, une évolution centrée sur les composants internes et la réactivité.

item.title: XChat is now available on the iOS store
item.description: X's rebranded DMs, XChat, now has a standalone app in the iOS store
